description: Catalogue des services/intégrations MCP — définit les credentials requis, endpoints de validation et paramètres par défaut

figma.label: Figma
figma.description_en: Design files, tokens & UI signals via MCP
figma.description_fr: Fichiers design, tokens & signaux UI via MCP

credentials.help_en:
Create a token at https://www.figma.com/settings (Security tab > Personal access tokens)
Required scopes: current_user:read, file_content:read, file_metadata:read, projects:read, library_assets:read
Optional (Enterprise only): file_variables:read
Note: the legacy scopes file:read and files:read are deprecated.
credentials.help_fr:
Créez un token sur https://www.figma.com/settings (onglet Sécurité > Personal access tokens)
Scopes requis : current_user:read, file_content:read, file_metadata:read, projects:read, library_assets:read
Optionnel (Enterprise uniquement) : file_variables:read
Note : les anciens scopes file:read et files:read sont dépréciés.

credentials.help_en: Timeout in milliseconds for Figma API requests (default: 30000 = 30s). Increase for slow connections or large files.
credentials.help_fr: Timeout en millisecondes pour les requêtes API Figma (défaut : 30000 = 30s). Augmenter pour les connexions lentes ou les gros fichiers.

gitlab.label: GitLab
gitlab.description_en: Repos, issues, merge requests & CI/CD via MCP
gitlab.description_fr: Repos, issues, merge requests & CI/CD via MCP

credentials.help_en:
Create a token at <your-gitlab>/-/profile/personal_access_tokens
Required scopes: api (full API access including issues, MRs, labels, milestones), read_user (identity validation)
Note: for self-hosted instances, replace the URL accordingly.
credentials.help_fr:
Créez un token sur <votre-gitlab>/-/profile/personal_access_tokens
Scopes requis : api (accès complet à l'API : issues, MRs, labels, milestones), read_user (validation d'identité)
Note : pour une instance self-hosted, remplacer l'URL en conséquence.

credentials.help_en:
Base URL of your GitLab instance (leave empty for gitlab.com).
Example for self-hosted: https://gitlab.mycompany.com
credentials.help_fr:
URL de base de votre instance GitLab (laisser vide pour gitlab.com).
Exemple self-hosted : https://gitlab.monentreprise.com

credentials.help_en: Timeout in milliseconds for GitLab API requests (default: 30000 = 30s). Increase for slow self-hosted instances.
credentials.help_fr: Timeout en millisecondes pour les requêtes API GitLab (défaut : 30000 = 30s). Augmenter pour les instances self-hosted lentes.
